feat: 원생고유번호로 학생 매칭 및 이름 변경 자동 업데이트

기능 추가:
1. 원생고유번호(studentCode)로 학생 우선 매칭
   - 이름이 바뀌어도 동일 학생으로 인식
   - 매칭 우선순위: 원생고유번호 > 이름

2. 이름 변경 자동 업데이트
   - MakeEdu에서 이름이 변경되면 자동 반영
   - getUpdatableFields에 '이름' 필드 추가
   - buildUpdateData에 이름 업데이트 로직 추가

3. 프론트엔드 (MakeEduSyncModal)
   - ijwCodeMap 추가로 원생고유번호 매칭
   - matchType에 'code' 추가 (원생고유번호 매칭 표시)

4. 백엔드 (scheduledMakeEduSync)
   - ijwCodeMap 추가로 원생고유번호 매칭
   - 매칭 로그 개선 (어떤 방식으로 매칭되었는지 표시)

예시 시나리오:
- 학생 "홍길동"이 원생고유번호 "12345"로 등록됨
- MakeEdu에서 이름이 "홍길순"으로 변경됨
- 다음 동기화 시 원생고유번호 "12345"로 매칭되어 이름이 "홍길순"으로 자동 업데이트

commit.message:
refactor(api): remove TaskTemplate CRD to simplify API (#71)

* refactor(api): remove TaskTemplate CRD to simplify API

Remove the TaskTemplate CRD entirely, simplifying the API from a
three-layer model (Task -> TaskTemplate -> Agent) to a pure two-layer
model (Task + Agent):

- Task = WHAT (the task to execute, with optional inline contexts)
- Agent = HOW (the execution configuration, with contexts, credentials)

Changes:
- Remove TaskTemplate, TaskTemplateSpec, TaskTemplateList types
- Remove TaskTemplateRef field from TaskSpec
- Remove resolveTaskTemplate() from controller and simplify initializeTask()
- Remove TaskTemplate REST handler, routes, and server types
- Remove TaskTemplate RBAC permissions from ClusterRoles
- Delete TaskTemplate CRD files from deploy/crds and charts/crds
- Remove Templates pages, routes, and mock data from UI
- Remove all TaskTemplate-related integration and E2E tests
- Update documentation to reflect two-layer API model
- Add ADR 0014 documenting this architectural decision

This is a breaking change acceptable in v1alpha1. All TaskTemplate
functionality is absorbed by Agent (contexts, credentials, skills).

Signed-off-by: Zhao Xue <zxue@redhat.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: xuezhaojun <zxue@redhat.com>

* fix: restore CEL validation empty string quotes in CRD YAMLs

controller-gen incorrectly converts '' (single-quoted empty string)
to " (lone double quote) in CEL validation rules, causing CRD
installation failures. Restore the correct single-quote format for
empty string comparisons in both agents and tasks CRDs.

Signed-off-by: Zhao Xue <zxue@redhat.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: xuezhaojun <zxue@redhat.com>

* fix(e2e): update agentRef validation test for CRD-level enforcement

Since agentRef is now required at the CRD schema level, the API server
rejects Task creation without agentRef before the controller runs.
Update the test to verify API server rejection instead of controller
failure handling.

Signed-off-by: Zhao Xue <zxue@redhat.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: xuezhaojun <zxue@redhat.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: xuezhaojun <zxue@redhat.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix 4 bugs: sync off-by-one, DB error handling, URL resolution, SQL escaping

- Incremental sync: use < instead of <= for updated_date boundary to
  avoid skipping jobs at the exact boundary timestamp
- Pipeline worker: wrap mark_applied/mark_excluded in try/except to
  prevent DB errors from killing the worker
- URL resolution: distinguish simplify.jobs redirects (no external URL,
  delete) from network failures (transient, exclude)
- SQL filter builder: escape single quotes in YAML filter values to
  prevent SQL syntax errors

Add VMS.Labeling standalone app and VMS.Core shared library

Separate deep learning labeling/training functionality from VMS.VisionSetup
into a dedicated application for better UI/UX space utilization.

- VMS.Core: shared models (LabelInfo, AnnotationDataset, TrainingConfig),
  interfaces (IAnnotationService, ITrainingService), and services

  multi-file image import, folder dialog for export, dark theme

- Add OCRTool with PP-OCRv4 ONNX engine and custom model hot-swap

Fix PKCE: robust encoding + embed verifier in state param

commit.message:
fix: auto-set HF_HOME to network volume in main.py

vLLM downloads model weights to /root/.cache/huggingface by default,
which fills the 50GB container disk. Now main.py sets HF_HOME to
/workspace/.cache/huggingface (network volume) automatically on RunPod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Reorder screenshots: lakes, species, where, what to throw

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Clear button not resetting fills in the WKWebView

When fills dictionary becomes empty (after clear), call the JavaScript
clearAllFills() function to actually reset all SVG element fills to
white in the DOM. Previously, applyFills only iterated over the
dictionary entries, so an empty dictionary resulted in no JS calls,
leaving the colored fills visible in the WebView.

add 17 new features: digest, embeddings, kanban, timeline, and more

Backend:

- Semantic Scholar citation count tracking

Frontend:
- Kanban board with drag-and-drop (@hello-pangea/dnd)
- Paper comparison view (side-by-side table)
- Timeline analytics chart (recharts)
- Author profile page with stats and paper list
- Settings page for watchlist and schedule management
- Custom feeds CRUD with color picker
- BibTeX export (copy to clipboard)
- Collapsible similar papers, notes (auto-save), deep analyze button

- Error boundaries on all routes

commit.message:
feat(collections): add HuggingFace embedding models collection support (#97)

Add comprehensive support for processing HuggingFace embedding models
collections with automatic discovery, version tagging, and catalog
generation.

Changes:
- Add embedding models discovery pattern to HuggingFace client
- Create other-models processing workflow in Makefile
- Support 5 embedding models: embeddinggemma-300m, granite-embedding-english-r2,
  nomic-embed-text-v1.5, Qwen3-Embedding-8B, all-MiniLM-L6-v2
- Include other-models catalog files in Docker image

Generated artifacts:
- data/other-models-index.yaml (12 lines, 5 models)
- data/other-models-catalog.yaml (221 lines, complete metadata)

Signed-off-by: Chris Hambridge <chambrid@redhat.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Enforce dual sign-off contract: both user AND critic must approve

The formalizer agent now requires BOTH parties to agree at every phase:
- Critic agent reviews each proposal for physics validity, testability,
  deception risk, and completeness before user sees it
- User reviews proposal WITH critic's feedback
- Neither party can be overruled on physics or deception grounds
- User can override critic on soft constraints (logged with reason)
- All overrides recorded in SPEC.md sign-off log appendix

Integrates with VVUQ contract verification at vvuq.dirkenglund.org
for claim validation during formalization.

fix(core, desktop): launch env isolation, imported sessions, macOS permissions (#43)

* chore: use ~/.mainframe_dev data dir for development

Separate dev data directory from production (~/.mainframe) to prevent
interference when running both simultaneously.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core, desktop): isolate launch process env and restore state on reload

- Replace blocklist env strategy with allowlist in cleanEnv() — only
  essential OS/user vars (PATH, HOME, SHELL, LANG, etc.) are passed to
  launched processes. Prevents NODE_ENV=production leak from Electron
  that broke Vite dev mode (_jsxDEV not a function).
- Fix fetchLaunchStatuses response parsing — was treating the outer
  { statuses, tunnelUrls } object as the statuses map, so launch state
  was never restored after CMD+R reload.
- Add whitespace-pre-wrap and select-text to console output so newlines
  render correctly and text can be highlighted/copied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core, desktop): imported sessions, plan paths, ghost mentions, macOS permissions

- Remap chatId on history messages loaded from disk — loadHistory embeds
  the Claude session UUID, not the Mainframe chat ID
- Filter ghost entries from sessions-index.json — verify JSONL file
  exists on disk before listing importable sessions
- Resolve plan file paths to absolute — CLI stores relative paths in
  toolUseResult.filePath, causing "Failed to load file" in the editor
- Allow file reads from ~/.claude/ via resolveClaudeConfigPath fallback
  in the files route (plan files live outside the project root)
- Skip mention extraction on command/skill injection messages to prevent
  false @-mentions from template text (e.g. @scope/pkg in /launch-config)
- Suppress macOS Apple Music/camera/mic permission prompts by nulling
  electron-builder's default media plist keys and adding a session-level
  permission request handler that denies media/sensor access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): add developer toolchain vars to launch env allowlist

JAVA_HOME, ANDROID_HOME, GOPATH, CARGO_HOME, RUSTUP_HOME, PYENV_ROOT,
NVM_DIR, VOLTA_HOME, BUN_INSTALL, DENO_DIR, DOTNET_ROOT, GRADLE_HOME,
MAVEN_HOME, M2_HOME — needed for ./gradlew, Go, Rust, Python, etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core, desktop): resolve login-shell env and relative executables

- Replace resolveShellPath() with resolveShellEnv() — runs `env` in the
  login shell to capture JAVA_HOME, SDKMAN vars, ANDROID_HOME, etc.
  that Electron's GUI-launched process.env doesn't include
- Resolve relative executables (./gradlew, ./mvnw) against the project
  directory before spawning — Node's spawn only searches PATH, not cwd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): add access() mock to external sessions test

The access() check added to skip ghost index entries needs a
corresponding mock so tests with sessions-index.json pass.

Make small detail shapes (eyes, bubbles, pebbles) tappable and fillable

Update the JS fillability engine to allow closed shapes inside
pointer-events="none" detail layers to be interactive. Circles (r>=2),
ellipses, rects, polygons, and closed paths in the decorative layer now
get pointer-events overridden to "all" and fill set to white, making
them tappable coloring targets. Open strokes (texture lines, hatching)
remain non-interactive.

Fix preloader cookie: remove invalid video preload, persist cookie 7 days

Switch preloader skip logic from cookie to sessionStorage only

- Remove cookies() call from app/page.tsx — page is now a static render
  with no per-request server logic, which also removes the forced dynamic
  rendering on every home page request
- Remove initialPreloaderShown prop from HomeClient entirely
- Remove document.cookie write from handlePreloaderComplete
- sessionStorage is now the sole skip mechanism: tab-isolated (new tab always
  sees the preloader) and not sent server-side (server always renders fresh)
- preloaderComplete and shouldSkipPreloader now initialize as false; the mount
  effect reads sessionStorage client-side and skips immediately if set
- fadeInContent gate (preloaderRanThisSession.current) unchanged — still only
  fires when the animation actually ran, suppressing the dark→cream transition
  for all skip paths

commit.message:
Fix March 10 live trading issues: ask-side pricing, spread fill parsing, max-profit cap

Critical fixes from the first live trading session (March 10, 2025):

- Schwab spread fill price parsing: use order-level net credit instead of
  averaging individual leg execution prices (root cause of $3,907 false P&L)
- Ask-side position valuation across all brokers: buy back short at ASK,
  sell long at BID (conservative cost-to-close)
- Max-profit cap on unrealized P&L: prevents inflated calculations from
  triggering premature profit target exits
- Chain-based pricing for dry-run and backtest brokers (replaces intrinsic-only)
- SPX 5-cent rounding on all spread order prices
- DB write failure halts all further entries for the session
- Runtime settings deep merge (runtime_settings.json over strategy_params.yaml)
- schema.sql bundled in PyInstaller/py2app builds
- ASCII-safe logger messages (em dash replaced for Windows cp1252)
- Conservative defaults: max_contracts=1, daily_contracts=1, swing_contracts=1
- Updated README with live trading status, all fixes, and 1,300+ test count

commit.message:
feat: v0.3.5 — 작업노트 깜빡임 근본 해결 + thinking 실시간 표시 + 캐시 버스트 자동화

기존:
- 작업노트 리렌더 시 innerHTML=''로 DOM 전체 삭제 후 재생성
  → 열린 그룹이 접혔다 펼쳐지는 깜빡임 발생
- 더보기(show more) 상태도 리렌더 시 리셋
- thinking 진행 중일 때 작업노트에 "응답 대기중..."만 표시
- 정적 파일 캐시 버스트가 ?v=2.8로 고정 → 코드 수정해도
  브라우저가 구 버전 캐시 사용
- SSE refetch에 타입 필터가 있어 response 등 일부 이벤트에
  작업노트가 갱신되지 않음
- pre-tool-hook에서 서버에 transcript 스캔 트리거 없음

변경:
- innerHTML='' → DocumentFragment + replaceChildren()으로
  한 번에 DOM 교체 (중간 빈 상태 없음)
- openGroups Set으로 그룹 펼침 상태 유지 + 열린 그룹은
  transition:'none'으로 애니메이션 없이 즉시 표시
- expandedChapters Set으로 더보기 상태도 리렌더 시 복원
- pendingChapterSteps 변수 추가: thinking만 있을 때
  steps를 저장 → /chris-log pending 챕터에 포함
- CACHE_BUST를 서버 시작 시 Date.now().toString(36)로 생성,
  handleRoot에서 ?v= 를 동적 치환 → 서버 재시작 = 캐시 무효화
- SSE refetch 타입 필터 제거 → 모든 이벤트에 1.5초 debounce
- pre-tool-hook에 /trigger-scan 엔드포인트 호출 추가
- 서버에 /trigger-scan 엔드포인트 추가 (즉시 transcript 스캔)
- renderContent에 try-catch + 에러 메시지 표시 추가
- thinking 표시 속도 개선: 3초→1초 간격, 2개씩 emit
- AI 대화 2줄 제한 (.slice(0, 2))
- 완료 대사 AI 생성 (complete_template)
- CHAT XML 필터 개선 (request/user-input은 태그만 strip)
- 테스트 검증 없이 완료 선언 금지 규칙 추가 (.claude/CLAUDE.md)

목적:
- 사용자가 작업노트를 펼쳐놓고 실시간 모니터링할 때
  깜빡임/접힘 없이 자연스럽게 내용이 늘어나도록
- thinking 진행 상황을 실시간으로 확인 가능하도록
- 매번 브라우저 캐싱 문제로 디버깅 시간 낭비하지 않도록

fix(agents): add enum deserialization, fix subscription name, add ETag point-read

ApprovalWorker + PaymentWorker: add static JsonSerializerOptions with
JsonStringEnumConverter(CamelCase) so Service Bus messages with camelCase
enum strings deserialize correctly instead of silently defaulting.

'sub-payment-agent' to match the Aspire-provisioned Service Bus subscription.

ensuring optimistic concurrency checks succeed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

server: fix v25 migration deserialization failure (#2235)

The v24 migration re-encodes applications using ApplicationBuilder, which
builds the current Application struct. After the cron scheduling revert
(2ec829e7), Application no longer has cron_schedule, so v24-encoded records
don't contain that field. The v25 migration's V24Application struct
incorrectly included cron_schedule, causing postcard to expect more bytes
than exist in the buffer.

Remove cron_schedule from V24Application to match what v24 actually stored.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Crop status bar from all screenshot frames (hero + carousel)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Apply lessons learned from CapPlanner build to /make-it skill

9 improvements based on first end-to-end build:

1. Prompt #1: Generate CHANGELOG.md, TODO.md, .env.example, .env on project setup
2. Prompt #1/#3: Mandate latest stable dependency versions, CVE check
3. Prompt #2: Require service/API layer for data fetching (no hardcoded mock data)
4. Prompt #2: Enforce single shared authenticated layout (no duplicate sidebars)
5. Prompt #4: Generate database migrations (Alembic/Prisma), not just models
6. Prompt #8: Require complete auth flow (token exchange, session, user creation)
7. Prompt #10b/10c: Require seed data migration for AI prompts (no empty tables)
8. Build-verify: Expand from 4 to 9 verification checks
9. Quality gate #3: Expand to 11 specific criteria before build is considered complete

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Disable Turbopack to fix Vercel build crash

Next.js 16 Turbopack causes fatal panic on Vercel:
"Dependency tracking is disabled so invalidation is not allowed"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
